scripts.build: npm run build -w @tribus-erp/core && npm run build -w @tribus-erp/api && npm run build -w @tribus-erp/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @tribus-erp/core && npm run typecheck -w @tribus-erp/api && npm run typecheck -w @tribus-erp/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @tribus-erp/core && npm run lint -w @tribus-erp/api && npm run lint -w @tribus-erp/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @tribus-erp/core && npm run test -w @tribus-erp/api && npm run test -w @tribus-erp/web
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w @tribus-erp/core && npm run test:coverage -w @tribus-erp/api && npm run test:coverage -w @tribus-erp/web
scripts.quality:check: npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:coverage
